The '''common thranta''' was the most common and well-known of the [[Thranta/Legends|thranta]] species native to the planet [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. The species was able to escape extinction even after the loss of their home, as some of the animals had been shipped to other locales such as [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].

[[File:Thranta_Riders.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Thranta riders on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].]]

The beasts had strong wing muscles which allowed them to fly in the skies of their homeworld. Like the other subspecies, they were trainable and would be controlled by [[Thranta Rider]]s. These handlers would place a compartment on the back of the beasts head while a larger passenger compartment was placed around its chest. Attempts were made to introduce the species to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], but the species could not survive the aerial pollution there. A large breed known as the [[giant thranta]] was identical to other common thrantas but, of course, larger in size. This is not to be confused with the [[great thranta]], which was a distinct species.
